name: search_flights
description: Search for flights between airports with natural language queries. Supports one-way, round-trip, and flexible date searches. Requires X402 micropayment (0.01 USDC).

arguments.name: from
arguments.desc: Origin airport code (IATA 3-letter) or city name

arguments.name: to
arguments.desc: Destination airport code (IATA 3-letter) or city name

arguments.name: return_date
arguments.desc: Return date in YYYY-MM-DD format (optional, for round-trip searches)

arguments.name: cabin_class
arguments.desc: Cabin class preference: economy, premium_economy, business, first

name: get_flight_details
description: Get detailed information about a specific flight including amenities, baggage policies, and real-time status.

arguments.name: flight_id
arguments.desc: Unique flight identifier returned from search results

name: check_balance
description: Check wallet balance and payment capability for X402 micropayments across supported networks (Base, Ethereum, Polygon).

name: get_booking_status
description: Check the status of a flight booking or payment transaction.

arguments.name: booking_reference
arguments.desc: Booking confirmation number or transaction hash
